title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Adda247 - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Adda247 - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adda247:
Adda247 is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247!
